_comment: Metadata source is the BUILT assembly + its XML doc file, not the
.csproj: DocFX would otherwise open the WinUI/WindowsAppSDK project in
a Roslyn workspace (XAML codegen, WinRT projection, the csproj's
BeforeBuild cargo step) and choke. The DLL + co-located FindMyFiles.xml
and self-contained dependency DLLs let DocFX read the public API and
resolve references without any of that. Build it first with
_comment_paths: DocFX resolves INPUT paths (src) relative to this docfx.json's dir, but
OUTPUT paths (dest/output) relative to the CALLER's CWD. `just doc-csharp`
and pages.yml always run from the repo root, so dest/output are written
WITHOUT the leading ../ (build/...), while src keeps ../ to climb out of
docfx/. Both land under the repo-root build/ tree (ADR-0021).

globalMetadata._appTitle: find-my-files — C# API リファレンス
